mapper.select: SELECT edition_year ,show_sponsors FROM event.public_display_setting WHERE setting_id = 1
mapper.update: INSERT INTO event.public_display_setting (setting_id, edition_year, show_sponsors, updated_by, updated_at) VALUES (1, #{editionYear,jdbcType=INTEGER}, COALESCE(#{showSponsors,jdbcType=CHAR}, 'Y'), #{uptUserSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT}, now()) ON CONFLICT (setting_id) DO UPDATE SET edition_year = EXCLUDED.edition_year, show_sponsors = EXCLUDED.show_sponsors, updated_by = EXCLUDED.updated_by, updated_at = now()
